positive: A mesmerizing, bioluminescent celestial river flowing through a stylized forest clearing. The scene features gigantic, symmetrical, flowering flora with intricate, crystalline petals, intertwined with glowing nebulae clouds and crescent moons. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, utilizing strong, deep silhouettes against an ethereal gradient background. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Celestial Minimalism, highly detailed etching style with a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep sapphire blue, iridescent teal, gold metallic accents, and midnight purple. The overall aesthetic must be clean, vector-like, and suitable for high-quality screen printing on apparel, with clear edges and defined shapes.
negative: blurry, photorealism, low contrast, grain, sketch, dirty, text, watermark, signature, cropped, artifact, mutated, poorly drawn, abstract chaos, ugly, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient spill
